states.name: Rin
states.title: Canine Blademaster
states.description: On a moonlit night, Rin Inugami calmly prepares for the approaching battle—no chink in her armor, no second wasted on sleep. With an imposing aura befitting the strongest of the Four Masters of the Bureau of Onmyo, she surveys the night with her piercing gaze.

states.name: Rin
states.title: Canine Blademaster
states.description: In order to subdue evil, one must learn to be cool-headed. To protect her country, Rin became the most realistic of the onmyoji. Even if one of her subordinates was murdered right in front of her, she would never let any feelings show up on her face.

states.name: Rin
states.title: Canine Blademaster
states.description: No matter how strict her attitude, how brutal her drills, how aloof the face she always wore, Rin's subordinates could never hate her. They knew her—the deepest devotion hiding behind her mask, the beauty of the countless tears she secretly shed every time she lost someone.
